description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:8 Docker image. Define a unit job in the default test stage that runs the following script: apt-get update --fix-missing && apt-get install -y wget bzip2 ca-certificates libglib2.0-0 libxext6 libsm6 libxrender1 git; wget -q https://repo.continuum.io/miniconda/Miniconda3-latest-Linux-x86_64.sh -O miniconda.sh; bash miniconda.sh -b -f -p $HOME/miniconda; export PATH=\"$HOME/miniconda/bin:$PATH\"; conda env create -q -f environment_cpu.yml; source activate tfbio_env; conda install -yq pytest-cov; py.test -v --cov=tfbio. The job runs on every pipeline without additional caches, artifacts, or rules.
